tr.th: Conclusion and Recommendations based on this report and previous findings known to us

tr.td: The patient shows mildly elevated HbA1c, suggesting prediabetes or impaired glucose tolerance. Hemoglobin is slightly above normal, which may be due to dehydration or other causes. Chloride and platelet distribution width are mildly elevated but of unclear clinical significance in isolation. Renal function, electrolytes, and blood counts are otherwise within normal limits. No acute abnormalities detected; recommend clinical correlation and monitoring of glycemic status.

text.div: Provider Organization: Cabinet de Médecine Générale
